Inside the thin circular border, two vertically stacked Japanese characters materialize. As the logo solidifies, a subtle, soft-focused ANAMORPHIC-STYLE LENS FLARE with hints of green and blue glints drifts horizontally across the characters, creating a brief, fleeting highlight before the logo settles into a steady, dim glow against the absolute black background.
1988 Cel Animation — From a black screen, a circular logo containing two Japanese characters with BOLD OUTLINES faintly appears in a dark celadon green. Below it, more Japanese text is rendered in a dark gold. A soft, radial glow of airbrushed color emanates from behind the central logo. The entire composition slowly brightens, with the logo's outlines transitioning to a brilliant white and the text below intensifying to a vibrant gold. Simultaneously, the background transforms from black to a deep, royal blue as streaking MOTION BLUR LINES of blue, yellow, and red light radiate outwards from the center, creating a dynamic starburst effect. The shot holds on the fully illuminated white logo and glowing gold text against the vibrant, radial light show.

On the flat-colored cel of the pavement below, a biker in a red shirt and olive-green pants lies sprawled on his back, a long metal pipe beside him. The camera executes a slow, smooth dolly pull backwards, moving away from the biker and the motorcycle. This motion creates a strong multi-layer parallax effect as rows of brilliant, circular ceiling lights on the densely detailed painted background recede into a distant vanishing point, their soft glows streaking into hand-drawn motion blur lines that emphasize the deep perspective of the nocturnal setting.
1988 Cel Animation — A wide, low-angle cinematic TRACKING SHOT moves forward along the dark asphalt of a multi-lane highway at night, creating a strong sense of perspective. In the far distance, the DENSELY DETAILED PAINTED BACKGROUND of the NEO-TOKYO skyline forms a complex silhouette of angular skyscrapers under a pitch-black sky, with tiny pinpricks of light indicating windows. Centered in the receding roadway is KANEDAS RED MOTORCYCLE, its single bright blue-white headlamp casting a soft, warm yellow pool of light on the pavement ahead. The smooth forward motion is conveyed by streaking MOTION BLUR LINES painted on the road surface and a MULTI-LAYER PARALLAX effect, where the foreground elements rush by while the distant city remains nearly static, establishing a powerful sense of speed and depth characteristic of high-frame-rate cel animation.

The camera reveals a determined-looking resistance fighter, Ryu, with a mustache and dark suit, who grits his teeth while being jostled. Other angry faces with mouths open in shouts surround him, their bodies overlapping to create a claustrophobic scene. Animated dust motes float through the air as fists clad in white gloves are raised, one thrusting aggressively toward the foreground and filling the frame as the camera continues its slow, tense movement through the riot.

Kei fires a pistol twice, each shot producing a bright, hand-drawn yellow and orange muzzle flash that briefly illuminates them. The force propels them backwards over the ledge, and they tumble through the air, their flat-colored cel bodies outlined in BOLD BLACK INK. They plunge into murky brown water below, which erupts in a large, opaque, and jaggedly drawn splash. The water churns, and the guard surfaces, flailing with his mouth agape. A moment later, another man in a brown jacket bursts from the muck, his face pale and covered in grime, his eyes wide and his mouth puffing out in shock.
1988 Cel Animation — In a dark, oppressive channel, the stout gang member Yamagata is submerged to his chest in a thick, brown, opaque liquid, his face a pale grey with cheeks puffed out and eyes wide in terror. Behind him, Kai, a slim teen in a cap, stands with his mouth open in a horrified scream. Animated with sudden, fluid motion, Yamagata's head jerks forward as he violently expels a hand-drawn splash of the brown liquid from his mouth, slumping into the muck and creating a larger splash of painted droplets. He slowly raises his head, the liquid now dripping from his slack, pained face. In the background, Kai’s expression shifts from terror to a grim scowl. The scene is rendered with BOLD BLACK INK OUTLINES and FLAT-COLORED CELS set against a deeply shadowed, painted background. A small, mud-splattered white cup bobs into view in the foreground.
1988 Cel Animation — In an almost completely dark environment defined by DEEP BLACKS, Kei is illuminated by a warm, hard light from an unseen source. Rendered in flat-colored cels with BOLD BLACK INK OUTLINES, she crouches, holding a black handgun in her right hand. Her face is a mask of determined anger, with furrowed brows and her mouth open in a slight grimace, showing her teeth. She wears a brown jacket over a black long-sleeved shirt with a red scarf around her neck. In a fluid motion animated on twos, she rises slightly, lifting the handgun with conviction. Her expression shifts from anger to intense focus as she brings her left hand up to steady her right, assuming a two-handed shooting stance and aiming directly forward, her eyes narrowed with lethal concentration.
1988 Cel Animation — In a dark, green-tinged environment, a burly soldier in a grey uniform and cap aims a pistol with a tense expression, a bead of sweat forming on his temple. His initial grimace shifts to wide-eyed panic, his mouth agape, before he fires. A brilliant yellow, starburst-shaped muzzle flash illuminates the frame in stark, high-contrast light for a single frame, followed by a tendril of opaque painted smoke curling from the barrel. The shot cuts to Kei, who aims her own pistol with a fiercely determined expression. She fires back, the shot producing another vivid yellow muzzle flash and a streaking yellow LIGHT TRAIL. A thin white motion line instantly appears in front of the soldier's face, followed by a graphic, hand-painted spray of bright red blood erupting violently from his eye. The impact throws his body backward, his arms flailing as his face contorts in shock, and he falls out of view. In a final wide shot, another man covered in brown muck stares forward in horror from a dark pool as the soldier collapses in the background.

As the foreground figure writhes, the soldier's head is violently struck by an unseen force, causing vivid, hand-drawn red blood to explode from his mouth in a spray of painted particles. The soldier's body convulses backward from the impact, more red splatter arcing through the air against the flat-colored cel background before he slumps into the oppressive darkness.

He wears a simple green gown and clutches a small, black teddy bear in one hand while his other hand grips the rumpled purple bedsheet. His expression shifts from fear to a grimace of intense pain as he clenches his eyes shut. The teddy bear suddenly levitates from his hands and drifts out of frame to the left. Takashi clutches his chest, then violently pulls the bedsheet over his head, writhing in agony and completely disappearing beneath the fabric.

A jarring cut jumps to an extreme close-up of his screaming mouth, drawn with BOLD BLACK INK OUTLINES against a void. The perspective then shifts to a point-of-view shot looking up from deep within a vertical shaft, beginning a slow, steady descent. This reveals a DENSELY DETAILED PAINTED BACKGROUND filled with a complex web of industrial pipes and machinery shrouded in DEEP BLACKS. The only light comes from small red, green, and blue indicator lights that cast a faint sheen on the flat-colored cels of the pipes. As the camera continues its downward TRACKING SHOT, more of the oppressive mechanical architecture scrolls into frame, including a small, yellow-lit access hatch before a glowing blue-green tunnel opening appears far below.
1988 Cel Animation — A low-angle, wide shot captures a vast and complex industrial interior, rendered as a DENSELY DETAILED PAINTED BACKGROUND steeped in DEEP BLACKS. The entire space is a labyrinth of enormous pipes, thick cables, and metallic structures with BOLD BLACK INK OUTLINES. The scene is illuminated only by scattered, vibrant indicator lights: glowing reds, blues, and cyans that punctuate the darkness on the machinery. To the left, a massive spherical device features a glowing red L-shaped display. In the center, an arched passageway emits a cool green-cyan glow from within, revealing paneled walls. Above, a rectangular hatch with yellow and black hazard stripes is lit by a warm yellow light. Thick vertical pipes on the right are bathed in a magenta and red sheen. The camera executes an extremely slow, almost imperceptible zoom forward, pushing deeper into the cavernous, high-tech environment.
1988 Cel Animation — A slow, deliberate camera tilt drifts upward across a massive, complex piece of industrial machinery, rendered on a DENSELY DETAILED PAINTED BACKGROUND shrouded in deep blacks and shadows. A large, spherical component made of rusted red metal plates forms the central mass, tangled with a dense network of thick pipes and conduits colored in faded green, metallic grey, and more oxidized red. BOLD BLACK INK OUTLINES define every panel, bolt, and wire, showcasing the tangible quality of the hand-drawn medium. Small, circular red and faint green indicator lights, painted as flat-colored cels, blink on and off in a slow, rhythmic sequence within the machinery's core. The subtle upward camera movement creates a MULTI-LAYER PARALLAX effect, causing the intricate layers of pipes to shift slightly against each other, giving the static structure an immense sense of scale and depth.

His face, rendered with BOLD BLACK INK OUTLINES, is a mask of pain, mouth agape and cheeks puffed as he presses himself against the wall beneath a rusted pipe. Clutching his chest with one hand, he groans, his expression shifting in sustained, pained animation. With trembling fingers, he fumbles inside his jacket and withdraws a small, bright orange pill container, his face a grimace of desperate concentration as he struggles frantically to open it.

The background is a DENSELY DETAILED PAINTED cityscape, with dark, oppressive building walls rising towards a narrow slice of pale blue sky. The scene is lit from above, casting BRILLIANT HIGHLIGHTS on the man's shoulders and the edges of the fluttering papers, which starkly contrast with the DEEP BLACKS of the shadowed alley.

He holds the chart up for the Colonel to inspect. The DENSELY DETAILED PAINTED BACKGROUND is filled with softly focused consoles and monitors glowing with blue and red lights. As the Colonel stares intently at the data, the scientist raises a hand and precisely points his index finger at a specific fluctuation on the chart, the entire scene held in a tense, static shot with deep blacks defining the space.

Her gaze drifts upward again, then her head tilts slightly as her eyes scan from side to side with a dazed, disoriented expression, her mouth slightly agape. She slowly brings her left hand up towards her chest, fingers slightly curled, as her expression shifts to one of weary concern. The scene is lit with high-contrast lighting, casting BRILLIANT HIGHLIGHTS along the edges of her face and arms against the deep, dark environment.

He carefully picks his way forward, then leaps with fluid motion from one broken slab to another, landing with a steady posture before coming to a complete stop. He stands still, a solitary silhouette looking out at the immense crater of THE OLYMPIC STADIUM and the ruined city beyond.
